security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: https: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self'

bundle.shortDescription: Local-first transcription and notes desktop app.
bundle.longDescription: Para-audio is a local-first desktop app for transcription, notes, and meeting capture.
